description: Dump truck (DT-14) sideswiped a light vehicle at a blind corner near the ROM pad. Light vehicle driver sustained a fractured wrist.
equipment_involved: Dump Truck DT-14 / Light Vehicle LV-07
root_cause: Inadequate traffic separation and missing convex mirror at junction
corrective_action: Install convex mirror at junction; enforce 20 km/h speed limit and traffic management plan

description: Bench face failure on the northern highwall. Three workers evacuated safely; one operator struck by falling rock and hospitalised.
root_cause: Geotechnical monitoring data not reviewed before shift; slope angle exceeded design
corrective_action: Halt operations on bench 3; engage geotechnical engineer for stability audit; review batter angles

description: A loose steel plate (approx. 12 kg) fell from the crusher feed chute onto the walkway below during maintenance. No one injured.
root_cause: Inadequate pre-maintenance inspection; missing bolts not identified during walkround
corrective_action: Mandatory torque-check checklist for all feed chute bolts before restarting; install fall-protection netting

description: Light vehicle driver fell asleep briefly and drifted toward the berm before recovering. No contact with berm.
root_cause: Fatigue — driver had worked 11 consecutive days without a rest day
corrective_action: Mandatory fatigue assessment before night shifts; enforce maximum 10-day roster; install in-cab fatigue alert

description: Mechanic splashed hydraulic fluid in eyes while replacing hose under pressure. Eye wash station used immediately; no lasting injury.
root_cause: Isolation lockout (LOTO) procedure not followed before pressurised hose replacement
corrective_action: Toolbox talk on LOTO procedures; re-train all mechanics; inspect LOTO compliance weekly

description: Operator slipped on wet clay steps leading from the FEL access ladder. Minor bruising to hip.
root_cause: No non-slip treads on ladder steps after heavy rainfall
corrective_action: Install rubber anti-slip treads on all FEL access ladders; add rainwater drainage channel

description: Detonators were stored in close proximity to bulk ANFO in the magazine — a regulatory violation discovered during an unannounced audit.
root_cause: Storage segregation not maintained; training gap in explosives handler team
corrective_action: Immediately re-segregate magazine; retrain all licensed shot-firers; schedule monthly magazine audits

description: Motor grader (MG-02) rolled over on a steeply sloped overburden dump edge. Operator sustained multiple rib fractures and was airlifted.
root_cause: Dump edge not bermed to specification; operator operating too close to unprotected edge
corrective_action: Halt dump operations; construct 1.5x tyre-height berm; retrain all dump operators on edge management

description: Maintenance worker's sleeve became entangled in a rotating conveyor roller while attempting to clear a blockage without isolating the belt.
root_cause: Belt not isolated before blockage clearance; guard removed and not replaced
corrective_action: Mandatory LOTO before any conveyor access; inspect all conveyor guards; supervisor accountability review

description: Diesel fuel overspill ignited briefly during bulk refuelling when static discharge contacted pooled fuel near a tanker. Extinguished within 30 seconds.
root_cause: No earthing lead connected during fuel transfer; bund not cleared of debris
corrective_action: Mandatory earthing protocol during all fuel transfers; bund clearance checklist; fire extinguisher audit

description: Pre-shift inspection found 4 workers entering the pit without safety glasses and 2 without hearing protection. Corrected before entry.
root_cause: Complacency; supervisors not enforcing PPE compliance at the gate
corrective_action: Gate PPE checks reinstated with supervisor sign-off; disciplinary notice issued; PPE refresher training

description: Civil inspection identified hairline cracks in haul road bridge culvert wall. Bridge flagged for load restriction pending full structural assessment.
root_cause: Routine inspection interval too long (6-monthly); cracks propagated undetected
corrective_action: Reduce inspection interval to monthly; impose 80t GVM load limit pending engineer sign-off

description: Elevated CH4 readings (0.85% v/v) detected on Pit-A bench 7 by portable gas monitor. Area evacuated and ventilated.
root_cause: Spontaneous coal seam gas emission from exposed coal face; no continuous gas monitoring in zone
corrective_action: Deploy fixed-point CH4 sensors on bench 7; establish 1.0% CH4 evacuation threshold; review ventilation plan

description: Sling rated at 5t failed while lifting a 3.8t excavator bucket. Bucket dropped 0.8 m onto workshop floor; no workers in drop zone.
root_cause: Sling was past its service life and had visible wear not flagged during pre-use inspection
corrective_action: Replace all out-of-service slings; implement QR-coded sling register with inspection log; re-train riggers

description: Driver noticed smoke from engine compartment of haul truck HT-09 during tip cycle. Engine shutdown and fire suppression system activated. No fire developed.
root_cause: Hydraulic oil leak onto hot exhaust manifold; leak not identified in pre-start inspection
corrective_action: Service HT-09; improve pre-start inspection form to include hydraulic line check; review FPS activation log

description: Three workers reported respiratory irritation after working downwind of the active coal stockpile during crushing operations without dust masks.
root_cause: No dust suppression water cart deployed; wind speed exceeded 25 km/h threshold without alert
corrective_action: Install wind-speed triggered dust suppression protocol; issue P2 respirators for all stockpile workers

description: One light vehicle was found inside the 500 m blast exclusion zone during a blast preparation period. Blast was held until vehicle was removed.
root_cause: Exclusion zone check not completed by shot-firer; radio communication failure between shot-firer and fleet
corrective_action: Review blast exclusion checklist; install GPS geo-fencing on all site vehicles with blast-zone alert

description: A pedestrian walked onto the active haul road from behind a parked loader without checking for approaching trucks. No collision; truck driver braked heavily.
root_cause: No designated pedestrian walkway; walker not wearing high-visibility vest
corrective_action: Establish marked pedestrian corridor with physical barriers; ban unescorted pedestrian access to haul roads

description: Oversize rock (approx. 0.6 m diameter) fell from a rear tipper truck during haulage and struck the road. No other vehicles in proximity.
root_cause: Oversize rock not removed during loading; exclusion zone for tipping ramp not observed
corrective_action: Mandate oversize rock removal before loading; deploy exclusion zone markers at dump face; retrain loaders

description: Drill rod segment ejected from down-the-hole drill rig during rod change. Rod landed 8 m from rig; operator sustained a minor laceration to forearm.
root_cause: Thread wear on drill rod coupling not identified; no exclusion zone enforced around drill rig during rod change
corrective_action: Remove DR-05 from service for inspection; enforce 15 m exclusion zone during rod changes; inspect all rod couplings
